variants.title: Filtrec FS133B7T125 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Fairey Arlon ST112B
variants.option1Value: Filtrec FS133B7T125 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Fairey Arlon ST112B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec FS133B7T125. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the FS133B7T125 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Suction Strainer, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 125µ, Outer Diameter: 86.0 mm, Length: 200.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 1 bar, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 125µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 1 BAR

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 77001 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Fairey Arlon ST112B
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 77001 Suction Strainer | Replaces the Fairey Arlon ST112B
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 77001 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 86.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 65.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"1/2-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 200.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 185.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 125µ, Outer Diameter: 86.0 mm, Length: 200.0 mm, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Thread: 1 1/2" BSP, Collapse Pressure: 1 BAR, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0100 S 125 W Suction Strainer. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
